Handout: What to Do if You Feel Sick 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this handout to share information about steps you can take if you're feeling sick with a respiratory illness. 
Taking precautions when sick can help stop the spread to others. 
Format: PDF Dimensions: 11x8.5 in Page count: 1 Language: English (US) Size: 845 KB Length: Last updated: December 10, 2025
